Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Continued To Apr-08-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Petitioner, Ermelinda Guerrero, is present as Guardian ad litem for Isabel Guerrero, a minor Claimant, who is also present.
Attorney, Cory A. Birnberg, appearing on behalf of the petitioner and claimant.

Ermelinda Guerrero and Isabel Guerrero are sworn. Counsel presents the case to the Court.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved. The total gross amount of judgment in favor of the minor claimant is $55,000.00. From the total judgment of $55,000.00, payment of fees is to be disbursed as follows: attorneys fees in the sum of $21,666.67 payable to Birnberg & Associates, Reimbursement for medical and all other expenses expenses paid by the petitioner or attorney in the sum of $2,593.79.

The balance of the judgment available for the claimant after payment of all allowed fees and expenses is $30,739.54, which is to deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual, 2011 Harbinson Drive, Vacaville, CA 95687. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years old.

Order Approving Compromise of Disputed Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire in open court.
